value.rootCause: Flex Consumption does not wake a scaled-to-zero app for a plain timer trigger, so graph-renew (NCRONTAB) logged 0 executions in 7d and subscriptions were heading for a silent lapse (azure-diagnostician root-caused, App Insights component cespk-orch-dev).
value.fix: Durable eternal-orchestration subscriptionMonitorOrchestrator (instanceId subscription-monitor-singleton, runtimeStatus Running): renew activity -> durable timer (SUBSCRIPTION_MONITOR_INTERVAL_HOURS, default 6h) -> continueAsNew. A durable timer message WAKES a scaled-to-zero Flex app (Microsoft Learn), so renewal fires unattended with NO always-ready instance and NO external scheduler. Bootstrapped by intake-starter (any intake traffic) and by the graph-renew HTTP route; the original graph-renew timer is retained as a backstop.

subscriptionRenewalRisk.sourceCommand: durable mgmt GET /runtime/webhooks/durabletask/instances/subscription-monitor-singleton (runtimeStatus Running, name subscriptionMonitorOrchestrator); also confirmed via POST /api/graph-renew JSON monitor.status=Running
subscriptionRenewalRisk.note: OPERATOR WATCH (next cycle): confirm an UNATTENDED renew fires at the durable-timer wake (~6h cadence) i.e. graph-renewal-success in App Insights with no manual trigger. 2026-06-29T15:39Z: the singleton was re-confirmed Running during the mailbox cutover (graph-renew HTTP returned monitor.status=Running) and it now covers all 3 production subs (it renews EVERY existing sub). DURABILITY GAP (recommended small code fix): runSubscriptionMaintenance create-misses + renews but never PRUNES — a mailbox REMOVED from GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES keeps its subscription (renewed forever), which is exactly why the de-scoped digital@ sub had to be deleted by hand here. Recommend adding a prune step to runSubscriptionMaintenance (subscriptions.ts): after create+renew, delete any of OUR subs whose mailboxOfResource(resource) is not in intakeMailboxes(), so a GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES change fully self-reconciles (add+remove) on the next maintenance tick. Belt-and-braces renewal fallback if the durable timer ever fails: az functionapp scale config always-ready set -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n cespk-orch-dev --settings function:graph-renew=1 (always-ready cost — flagged, NOT enabled).

postgresCounts.reason: 2026-06-30T09:35Z CORRECTIVE deploy: read authoritatively as csadmin (owner BYPASSES RLS -- confirmed: with app.role unset case_ STILL returned 20), so these are TRUE unfiltered counts. case_ = 20 (NOT 0 -- the registry's prior 0 was an RLS/stale read artifact: a read as the non-owner cespk_app WITHOUT app.role, or pre-intake). work_provider = 390 total (174 active / 216 inactive). PROVIDER AUTOMATION FLIP (user-approved 'Both' box-sync fix): UPDATE work_provider SET provider_automation_mode_code=100000001 (review_auto) WHERE active=true -> 174 rows affected; BEFORE all 390 were 100000000 manual; AFTER 174 active=review_auto + 216 inactive=manual. The stale csadmin KV pg-admin-password was NOT used (known rotation footgun) -- auth went via the Entra azure_pg_admin path. repairer/image_source/inspection_address NOT re-counted this pass. PRIOR 2026-06-30 (work-todo-spike LIVE migration): applied the idempotent additive DDL delta to db collisionspike as Entra digital@ (azure_pg_admin) -> SET ROLE csadmin (table owner). Added: ai_suggestion table (csadmin-owned, RLS ENABLE+FORCE, policies p_ai_suggestion_rw + p_ai_suggestion_no_delete, GRANT SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE to cespk_app, 3 FKs case/evidence CASCADE + inbound_email SET NULL, 4 indexes); inbound_email.suggested_category_code + suggested_subtype_code (+ canonical FKs); choice_audit_action 100000027-100000034 (8 rows); choice_case_status 100000011 'removed'; uq_case_case_po UNIQUE on upper(case_po) WHERE case_po IS NOT NULL (was ABSENT live, created fresh). public BASE tables 37->38; case_ confirmed 0 rows (owner read). The seed/910 provider_automation_mode_code flip was NOT applied (out of scope -- touches the 390-row corpus). A transient workstation firewall rule was added then REMOVED (only AllowAzureServices remains). NOTE: the csadmin KV secret pg-admin-password FAILED auth (2 versions, stale rotation footgun) -> DDL went via the Entra azure_pg_admin path instead. work_provider=390 last confirmed 2026-06-29 (not re-verified this pass; work_provider FORCE RLS reads 0 without app.role).

gates.docDrift: 2026-07-04: AUDIT_CASES_ENABLED=true on BOTH apps (user-instructed go-live; D10 delta applied FIRST per the delta's deploy-order warning; shadow-review step waived by the user). Prior: 2026-07-03 second wave: all four TRIAGE_* behaviour gates =true on orch (D7 taxonomy delta confirmed live first, per the delta's deploy-order warning); parser redeployed with the taxonomy-v2 engine. Prior: 2026-07-03 nine-task activation: OUTLOOK_MOVE_ENABLED=true on BOTH apps (user-instructed; Exchange Mail.ReadWrite grant still pending - moves 403 until B4 steps 1-2 done); orch PLATE_OCR_ENABLED/OCR_SCANNED_PDF_ENABLED/EMAIL_AI_ENABLED=true + AI_MODEL_ENDPOINT/AI_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT=gpt-5; api EVIDENCE_BLOB_* + LOCATION_ASSIST_*/AZURE_MAPS_ENABLED/LOCATION_SUGGEST_FN_* (location-assist live). Prior: 2026-07-02 TKT-054: OUTLOOK_MOVE_ENABLED ABSENT on both apps (dark by design — operator-blocked on the Mail.ReadWrite Exchange-RBAC re-consent, gated.md B4); OUTLOOK_MOVE_QUEUE_SERVICE_URL set on api only (the enqueue target — orch consumes the same queue via AzureWebJobsStorage); api MI holds Storage Queue Data Message Sender on cespkorchstdev01. Prior: 2026-06-30 work-todo-spike NEW wiring app-settings (tracked here so verify-live diffs them): orch OCR_FN_URL (plain host cespkocr-fn-dev-glju3v) + OCR_FN_KEY (KV ref cespk-pg-kv-dev/ocr-fn-key) for registration-visible plate OCR; api BOX_FN_URL (plain host cespkbox-fn-v76a47) + BOX_FN_KEY (KV ref cespk-pg-kv-dev/boxwebhook-fn-key, reused) for the Case/PO allocator new-provider Box fallback -- both follow the established *_FN_URL=plain / *_FN_KEY=KV-ref convention. Feature gates UNCHANGED: BOX_API_ENABLED, BOX_FOLDER_AT_INTAKE_ENABLED, BOX_FILEREQUEST_ENABLED are all 'true' on BOTH api and orch — Box is ACTIVATED, not off. ENRICHMENT_ENABLED and PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED are 'true' on both. EVA_API_ENABLED, VALUATION_ENABLED are not set (effectively off). BOX_EMBED_ENABLED and BOX_METADATA_ENABLED are no longer tracked here — both gates were RETIRED FROM CODE 2026-07-03 (the embed and metadata options were formally dropped, not merely left unset). GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES = info@ + engineers@ + desk@ (the production target; test mailbox digital@ removed in the 2026-06-29 mailbox cutover; info@/desk@ minIntakeDate 2026-06-29, engineers@ 2026-06-27). NOTE: PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED=true was unrecorded before the 2026-06-29 re-verification; CLAUDE.md's gate list describes default-off SEMANTICS, not current live values.

deployments.name: gpt-5
deployments.dataProcessing: GlobalStandard = inference may process in ANY Azure region (data at rest stays uksouth); no UK data zone exists (DataZone is US/EU only) and uksouth has no regional-Standard gpt-5 quota — Global is the only gpt-5 option here
